# Labels

This document defines the label taxonomy for this repository. Labels are used to categorize issues and PRs for efficient triage and discovery.

## Priority

| Label | Color | Description |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `priority: critical` | `#b60205` | Must be addressed immediately |
| `priority: high` | `#d93f0b` | Should be addressed this week |
| `priority: medium` | `#fbca04` | Should be addressed this month |
| `priority: low` | `#0e8a16` | Nice to have, no urgency |

## Type

| Label | Color | Description |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `bug` | `#d73a4a` | Something is not working |
| `enhancement` | `#a2eeef` | New feature or improvement |
| `documentation` | `#0075ca` | Documentation improvements |
| `good first issue` | `#7057ff` | Good for newcomers |
| `help wanted` | `#008672` | Extra attention is needed |
| `question` | `#d876e3` | Further information is requested |
| `duplicate` | `#cfd3d7` | This issue already exists |
| `wontfix` | `#ffffff` | This will not be worked on |
| `invalid` | `#e4e669` | This does not seem right |

## Division

| Label | Color | Description |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `engineering` | `#1d76db` | Engineering division agents |
| `design` | `#e99695` | Design division agents |
| `marketing` | `#f9d0c4` | Marketing division agents |
| `product` | `#c2e0c6` | Product division agents |
| `project-management` | `#bfdadc` | Project management agents |
| `testing` | `#d4c5f9` | Testing division agents |
| `support` | `#fef2c0` | Support division agents |
| `spatial-computing` | `#c5def5` | Spatial computing agents |
| `specialized` | `#bfd4f2` | Specialized agents |

## Workflow

| Label | Color | Description |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `ci` | `#ededed` | CI/CD and GitHub Actions |
| `playbooks` | `#c5def5` | Playbooks and strategy |
| `workflows` | `#006b75` | Workflow examples |
| `dependencies` | `#0366d6` | Dependency updates |
| `github-actions` | `#000000` | GitHub Actions updates |
| `plan-me` | `#5319e7` | Trigger CodeRabbit planning |
| `help-needed` | `#cc317c` | Contributor needs assistance |
| `stale` | `#ededed` | No recent activity |
| `security` | `#b60205` | Security-related issue |
